description: 26 - 23-03-2025 - Email to Peter Mandelson from Sir Oliver Robbins (former Permanent
text:
Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO)

From: Oliver RobbinsPersonal

Sent: Sun 23/03/2025 11:46:15 AM (UTC)

To: Peter MandelsonPersonal

Ce: Serena StonePersonal

Subject: DRAFT | FINAL SV ADVICE

Attachment: 2025-03-23 mn PM - SVs final advice.docx

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

Peter

While I’m hoping / assuming you'll like where this comes out, grateful for any
comments by 5pm London time today.

Olly

Sir Oliver Robbins KCMG CB

Permanent Under-Secretary | Foreian. Commonwealth & Development Office | Email:
Personal | Personal

OFFICIAL SENSITIVE HMG ONLY

Attachment:
PM

TRUMP INWARD STATE VISIT: FINAL ADVICE

74
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
